meta.title: STE. MOUAWAD | Natural Stone Art Since 1967
meta.description: STE. MOUAWAD transforms natural stone into churches, altars, sculptures, fireplaces, and architectural masterpieces across Lebanon and beyond.
meta.keywords: STE. MOUAWAD, natural stone, stone carving, churches, altars, sculptures, fireplaces, Lebanon

hero.title: Crafting Stone Into Timeless Art Since 1967
hero.description: For over five decades, STE. MOUAWAD has transformed natural stone into churches, altars, sculptures, fireplaces, and architectural masterpieces across Lebanon and beyond.

home.sectionText: Every commission is shaped with careful drawing, precise material selection, and hand-finished detail.

about.title: A Family Stone Atelier Since 1967
about.metaDescription: Learn about STE. MOUAWAD, a Lebanese family atelier shaping natural stone into sacred and architectural works since 1967.
about.intro: STE. MOUAWAD brings together traditional craftsmanship, architectural sensitivity, and deep respect for natural stone.
about.body: From concept sketches to final installation, the atelier works closely with architects, designers, parishes, and private clients to create enduring pieces with character and presence.

portfolio.title: Portfolio
portfolio.metaDescription: Explore STE. MOUAWAD's portfolio of churches, altars, sculptures, fireplaces, and custom natural stonework.
portfolio.intro: A selection of stonework spanning sacred spaces, residences, restoration details, and custom architectural commissions.

projects.title: Projects
projects.metaDescription: Browse current and featured STE. MOUAWAD natural stone projects managed through the website content folder.
projects.intro: Manage projects from the admin content folder by updating JSON entries and adding images.
projects.empty: Project entries will appear here once they are added to admin-content/projects.json.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.metaDescription: Contact STE. MOUAWAD for natural stone commissions, restoration work, sacred interiors, sculptures, and architectural features.
contact.intro: Tell us about your stonework project, restoration, or custom commission.
contact.name: Name
contact.details: Based in Lebanon. Available for projects locally and abroad.
